mnemonics: Many Angry Nations Reject Owners Daily
Monitor, Analyze, Negotiate, Organize, Review, Optimize, Notice Opportunities Daily
keyPoints: The acronym stands for team members
A manager's primary role is to oversee the team
The team is not owned by the manager
The team rejects the manager's orders daily
The manager must analyze the team's performance daily
The manager must negotiate with the team
The manager must organize the team's tasks
The manager must review the team's progress daily
The manager must optimize the team's performance
The manager must notice opportunities for improvement daily
